notes: Music plays, but nothing else happens - no visuals.
title: Blood Bowl: Chaos Edition

notes: Music plays, but no window appears.
title: Blood Bowl: Chaos Edition

notes: Initially, I could hear the game but it didn't seem to spawn a window. After switching to Gnome overview mode and back, a window showed up but it was all black. I clicked in the window and the game's main menu appeared. I played a bit of the tutorial after that and everything seemed to work fine but then I tried to change the game to full screen mode and increase the resolution. After that I couldn't get the game to launch until I re-installed it. Everything seems fine now but I'll probably need to leave it in windowed mode in order to be able to play.
title: Blood Bowl: Chaos Edition

notes: Game starts with black screen with sound. Had to exit Steam (game sound still playing in the background after exit). Once Steam was restarted game worked perfectly.
title: Blood Bowl: Chaos Edition

notes: After launching the game, no window opens but the music plays. Wait for about 65 seconds and a full screen black window will show, clicking anywhere will get you to the main menu and from there you'll be able to play with seemingly no other issues.
title: Blood Bowl: Chaos Edition
